'''yajunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nic|nic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nic|nic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yajunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæjinith|yæjinith]] || [[word:yæjinij|yæjinij]] || [[word:yæjinish|yæjinish]] || [[word:yæjini|yæjini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajujunuth|yajujunuth]] || [[word:yajujunuj|yajujunuj]] || [[word:yajujunush|yajujunush]] || [[word:yajujunu|yajujunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajunuth|yajunuth]] || [[word:yajunuj|yajunuj]] || [[word:yajunush|yajunush]] || [[word:yajunu|yajunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajufnufth|yajufnufth]] || [[word:yajufnufj|yajufnufj]] || [[word:yajufnufsh|yajufnufsh]] || [[word:yajufnuf|yajufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yajunuthu|yajunuthu]] || [[word:yajunuju|yajunuju]] || [[word:yajunushu|yajunushu]] || [[word:yajunuku|yajunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yajunuth|yajunuth]] || [[word:yajunuj|yajunuj]] || [[word:yajunush|yajunush]] || [[word:yajunu|yajunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yajunuthul|yajunuthul]] || [[word:yajunujul|yajunujul]] || [[word:yajunushul|yajunushul]] || [[word:yajunukul|yajunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yajunuuthuthu|yajunuuthuthu]] || [[word:yajunuujuju|yajunuujuju]] || [[word:yajunuushushu|yajunuushushu]] || [[word:yajunuuku|yajunuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yajunuthun|yajunuthun]] || [[word:yajunujun|yajunujun]] || [[word:yajunushun|yajunushun]] || [[word:yajunukun|yajunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yajunuthuoro|yajunuthuoro]] || [[word:yajunujuoro|yajunujuoro]] || [[word:yajunushuoro|yajunushuoro]] || [[word:yajunukuoro|yajunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
